form.formComment: Most recently rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 11 at Randwick Kensington Bm78 on March 25 over 1800m, slow going 1.5 len behind Glad You Think So with 58.5kg at $19. Before that 5th of 13 at Randwick Bm88 on February 28 over 2000m, slow going 5 len behind Mr Monaco with 54kg at $26. Not far away of late. Starting to find form and he loves the 2400m journey.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out on jumping and bumped Fioprospero.
Began awkwardly and then contacted by Sir Chartwell.
On jumping shifted in and made contact with Be Real.

form.formComment: Most recently ran on from midfield and won by 1.3 len at this track Bm78 April 1 over 2200m on a soft track defeating Cormac T with 56.5kg at $16. The run before that tried to lead throughout but was claimed late 3rd of 8 at Wyong Bm78 on March 18 over 2125m, slow going 0.9 len behind Subarctic carrying 56.5kg at $4.40. In sublime form of late and is hard to rule out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rounding the home turn, shifted ground.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 10 at this track Bm78 on April 1 over 2200m, slow going 3.5 len behind Stylebender carrying 57.5kg at $17. Before that 7th of 14 at Albury in the LR Albury Cup on March 20 over 2000m, slow going 4 len behind Bianco Vilano carrying 54kg at $51. Rock hard fit and the further the better for this grinding stayer.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted behind runners from the outside barrier in the early stages.
On jumping shifted out and bumped Stylebender.
From the outside barrier shifted behind runners in the early stages.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 6th of 10 at this track Bm78 on March 11 over 1600m, slow going 4.5 len behind Fiddlers Green with 59kg at $31. Last start sat on the speed throughout before fading 8th of 11 at Randwick Kensington Bm78 on March 25 over 1800m, slow going 9 len behind Glad You Think So with 59kg at $41. Gets to the right race at the third run back and is a terrific chance to return to form.

form.formComment: Most recently favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.7 len at Wyong Cl1-Sw March 28 over 2100m on a soft track defeating Rita's Pearl carrying 59kg at $1.85. The start before that 6th of 12 at Hawkesbury Bm64 on March 7 over 1800m, slow going 2 len behind King Kikau with 59kg at $19. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again despite the class rise.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(9.5). previousStarts.stewardsComment: On jumping made contact with Sir Loyne.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 10 at this track Bm78 on April 1 over 2200m, slow going 1.3 len behind Stylebender with 54kg at $6. The run before that settled well back; won by 3 len at Kembla Grange Bm68 March 13 over 2400m in soft going defeating Goofinator carrying 56kg at $6.50. Consistent stayer with no weight and he should run well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide and without cover throughout the event.
Inclined to lay in during the early part of the home straight.

form.formComment: Returns from a 42-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 10 at this track Bm72 on March 4 over 2110m, slow going 41 len behind Goofinator carrying 56kg at $6. The start before that 3rd of 10 at Gosford Bm64 on February 5 over 2100m, 1.5 len behind De Louviere carrying 60kg at $6.50. Looking to others.
